gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor stands confidently, opens both arms wide as if inviting everyone into a fun adventure in learning, smiling enthusiastically.
a person tilts their head slightly, raises one hand to encourage thought, and takes a small step forward toward the learners.
a tutor gestures with both hands moving together, demonstrating the concept of bringing numbers together while speaking about addition.
a person points to an imaginary space in front with an outstretched arm while counting up in excitement about apples.
a tutor raises both hands with open palms, celebrating with a joyful bounce to emphasize the total of five apples.
a person shifts their weight slightly back, moving one hand outward as if to illustrate taking away, while explaining subtraction.
a tutor crouches slightly, looks around the class, and gestures toward an imaginary group of apples to engage learners in solving.
a person smiles widely, nods their head, and raises one finger in the air to signify they have the right answer about the apples.
a tutor stands tall, moves hands apart to visually represent combining numbers for addition and pulling them back for subtraction.
a person claps their hands together enthusiastically, stepping forward slightly to recognize everyone’s hard work and participation.
